case_title: GARY SCHEFSKY VS. DAVID BARRY et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT BARRY, DAVID DBA BARRY & ASSOCIATES

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHEFSKY, GARY TRUSTEE OF BARBARA SCHEFSKY SURVIVOR'S REAL ESTATE HOLDING TRUST SERVED MAY-18-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARRY, DAVID DBA BARRY & ASSOCIATES
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-08-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF FILING OF ARBITRATOR'S AWARD FILED BY DEFENDANT BARRY, DAVID DBA BARRY & ASSOCIATES
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-08-2010 CONTINUED TO APR-08-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR STATUS OF BINDING ARBITRATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHEFSKY, GARY TRUSTEE OF BARBARA SCHEFSKY SURVIVOR'S REAL ESTATE HOLDING TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT BARRY, DAVID DBA BARRY & ASSOCIATES DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-08-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-23-2010

NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION REQ. FOR JUDICIAL NTC, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT BARRY, DAVID DBA BARRY & ASSOCIATES HEARING SET FOR JUN-11-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-11-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER ON STIPULATION COMPELLING ARBITRATION AND STAYING ACTION

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT DAVID BARRY'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION REQ. FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. A SIGNED STIPULATION AND ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION AND STAYING ACTION WAS PRESENTED IN OPEN COURT AND SIGNED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE OF STIPULATION AND ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION AND STAYING ACTION FILED BY DEFENDANT BARRY, DAVID DBA BARRY & ASSOCIATES
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
